V0006_01_00_00_0.text: This is my fight and my fight alone.

V0006_01_00_01_0.text: I'll Duel you! This will be incredible!

V0006_01_00_03_0.text: For everything I hold dear, I can't afford to lose this Duel!

V0006_01_00_04_0.text: It's our destiny to Duel, and this is one Duel that I must win!

V0006_03_00_01_0.text: I have to keep this up.

V0006_03_00_05_0.text: I have to turn this Duel around soon.

V0006_05_00_00_0.text: I believe in the heart of the cards!

V0006_06_01_02_0.text: Just what I was waiting for!

V0006_08_00_04_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Soul Rope!

V0006_08_00_04_1.text: I Special Summon 1 Level 4 monster from my Deck.

V0006_08_00_05_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Mystic Box!

V0006_08_00_06_0.text: Now's my chance! Spell Shattering Arrow!

V0006_08_00_07_0.text: Too bad, but my face-down card is...

V0006_09_00_00_1.text: The attacking player takes of damage.

V0006_09_00_03_0.text: Valkyrion the Magna Warrior's special effect activates!

V0006_09_00_03_1.text: I can Special Summon Alpha, Beta, and Gamma the Magnet Warriors from the Graveyard!

V0006_10_00_01_0.text: I know just what I need!

V0006_11_00_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Attack Position!

V0006_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0006_13_00_02_0.text: I have other magicians you may not be familiar with.

V0006_13_00_03_0.text: I Special Summon Valkyrion the Magna Warrior!

V0006_13_00_05_0.text: Here's Gandora the Dragon of Destruction!

V0006_15_00_00_0.text: Let's see you get past this!

V0006_18_00_00_0.text: My monster attacks your Life Points directly!

V0006_18_00_01_0.text: I attack your Life Points directly!

V0006_28_00_00_1.text: That was a tough Duel, but I pulled through in the end!

V0006_28_00_01_0.text: I may have won, but you put up an awesome fight! Good job!

V0006_28_00_03_0.text: I'll never forget you, my friend. Never.

V0006_29_00_00_1.text: Maybe I can't win on my own...

V0006_30_00_02_0.text: Don't worry about me. Take your time.

V0006_33_00_00_0.text: I put my whole heart into this Deck so that I can defeat you!

V0006_33_00_02_0.text: Let's see how you measure up against this!

V0006_34_00_00_0.text: I must hone my skills and become a better Duelist!

V0006_34_00_01_0.text: Thank you! I've always wanted to Duel you!

V0006_34_00_02_0.text: You should never underestimate your opponent, especially me!

V0006_34_00_03_0.text: It all seems so hopeless... What should I do?

V0006_34_00_05_0.text: I'll win this Duel on my own!

V0006_34_00_06_0.text: You knew what I was going to play?

V0006_34_00_07_0.text: My combo is already ready to go!

V0006_34_00_08_0.text: I don't know if there's any way I can win...

V0006_34_00_09_0.text: I'm not going to fall for that trick again.

V0006_26_00_01_0.text: You shouldn't get your hopes up yet...

V0006_27_00_01_0.text: The game's not over until the last card is played!

V0006_27_00_02_0.text: Argh... I know I can still win...

V0006_01_00_05_0.text: I will put every ounce of energy I have into this Duel!

V0006_01_00_06_0.text: Not even the Pharaoh knows what cards are in this Deck!

V0006_01_00_07_0.text: This Duel is going to be great!

V0006_01_00_08_0.text: You don't want me to go easy on you,  do you Grandpa?

V0006_01_00_11_0.text: I won't let the darkness inside my heart overwhelm me!

V0006_01_00_12_0.text: Let's just enjoy this Duel, Leon!

V0006_01_00_13_0.text: We won't let your prophecy come true!

V0006_01_00_14_0.text: Jaden, why do I feel like you and I are a lot alike...

V0006_01_00_15_0.text:
Wow!
I get to Duel against a Duelist from the future!

V0006_01_00_16_0.text:
Paradox!
We're going to rise to your challenge!

V0006_21_00_03_0.text: I still have to keep playing carefully.

V0006_21_00_04_0.text: That brings my turn to an end.

V0006_21_00_05_0.text: No matter how bad it looks, I'm never giving up!

V0006_28_00_05_0.text: I put my heart into each and every one of my cards!

V0006_28_00_06_0.text:
That was a great Duel!
I can't wait to play you again!

V0006_28_00_08_0.text: I hope you didn't dislocate your hip, Grandpa.

V0006_28_00_11_0.text: Jaden, I can tell you and your Deck have a special bond!

V0006_28_00_12_0.text: The magic of Duel Monsters will make sure we meet again.

V0006_28_00_13_0.text: Our monsters will never lose to the likes of you!

V0006_29_00_03_0.text: If I keep working hard, I know I'll win in the end!

V0006_29_00_04_0.text: Maybe I didn't have the right balance of cards in my Deck...

V0006_29_00_05_0.text:
You did great!
You didn't give me a single chance!

V0006_29_00_06_0.text: When it comes to playing games, you're no slouch, Grandpa!

V0006_29_00_07_0.text: That's why you're the American champion, Rebecca!

V0006_29_00_08_0.text:
Wow...
You're in total control of your Deck, Jaden!

V0006_29_00_09_0.text: I've never seen anything like your Stardust Dragon, Yusei!

V0006_34_00_10_0.text: You should rebuild your Deck. I already know how to beat it.

V0006_36_00_00_0.text: Just a little more! Keep it up!

V0006_36_00_01_0.text:
You're up.
You can do this!

V0006_36_00_02_0.text: I'm sorry to put us in this mess...

V0006_36_00_03_0.text: I know I can always count on you!

V0006_36_00_07_0.text: Jaden, I know you'll do great!

V0006_36_00_08_0.text: Show 'em what you can do, Yusei!

V0006_08_00_08_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Silent Burning!

V0006_08_00_09_0.text: I banish Silent Burning from my Graveyard to use its effect!

V0006_08_00_10_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Swords of Revealing Light!

V0006_08_00_11_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Ties of the Brethren!

V0006_08_00_12_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Card of Sanctity!

V0006_08_00_13_0.text:
The card I'll play is...
Exchange!

V0006_08_00_14_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Silent Sword Slash!

V0006_08_00_15_0.text: I banish Silent Sword Slash from my Graveyard!

V0006_08_00_16_0.text: Why is this card in my Deck...

V0006_08_00_16_1.text:
The Seal of Orichalcos!
Power up my monsters!

V0006_08_00_17_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Shining Sarcophagus!

V0006_08_00_19_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Soul Release!

V0006_08_00_20_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Heavy Storm!

V0006_08_00_21_0.text: I activate the Continuous Spell, Toy Box!

V0006_08_00_23_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Future Silence!

V0006_08_00_24_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Ties That Bind!

V0006_08_00_25_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Dark Hole!

V0006_08_00_26_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Magnet Reverse!

V0006_08_00_27_0.text: I activate my Quick-Play Spell, Turn Silence!

V0006_08_00_28_0.text: I activate the Equip Spell, Magic Formula!

V0006_08_00_29_0.text: Magic Formula activates when it goes to the Graveyard!

V0006_08_00_30_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Thousand Knives!

V0006_08_00_31_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Magical Dimension!

V0006_08_00_32_0.text:
I activate my Ritual Spell!
Black Luster Ritual!

V0006_08_00_33_0.text: The Continuous Trap, Stronghold the Moving Fortress!

V0006_08_00_34_0.text:
I play my Continuous Trap!
Stronghold the Hidden Fortress!

V0006_08_00_36_0.text:
I'll activate my Trap Card!
Magical Arm Shield!

V0006_08_00_37_0.text:
I flip over my Trap Card!
Mystical Refpanel!

V0006_08_00_37_1.text: Mystical Refpanel absorbs and redirects the Spell!

V0006_08_00_38_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Shift!

V0006_08_00_39_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Magnet Force!

V0006_08_00_40_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Magical Hats!

V0006_08_00_41_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Dark Renewal!

V0006_08_00_42_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Magic Cylinder!

V0006_08_00_00_0.text: I'll activate my Spell Card, Gold Sarcophagus!

V0006_08_00_00_1.text: I'm sealing a card inside this Gold Sarcophagus.

V0006_08_00_43_0.text: I'll now unseal my Gold Sarcophagus!

V0006_09_00_04_0.text: Dark Magician the Knight of Dragon Magic uses his effect!

V0006_09_00_11_0.text: I activate Silent Swordsman Zero's effect!

V0006_09_00_13_0.text: Gigarays Gandora unleashes its magical blast!

V0006_09_00_14_0.text: I activate this card from my hand and Special Summon it!

V0006_09_00_15_0.text: I activate Gandora-G the Dragon of Destruction's effect!

V0006_09_00_21_0.text: Archfiend of Gilfer activates when it goes to the Graveyard!

V0006_09_00_22_0.text:
Red-Eyes!
Let your soul fire up the heart of a Duelist!

V0006_09_00_23_0.text: I have to keep fighting until I have nothing left to give...

V0006_09_00_24_0.text:
I've gathered all the cards I need!
I Summon Exodia!

V0006_09_00_29_0.text: I activate Kuriboh's effect from my hand!

V0006_08_00_44_0.text:
Stronghold the Hidden Fortress!
Destroy their monster!

V0006_13_00_10_0.text:
Enter the Duel!
Dark Magician the Knight of Dragon Magic!

V0006_13_00_19_0.text:
Emerge!
Gigarays Gandora the Dragon of Destruction!

V0006_13_00_20_0.text:
Iron dragon!
Emit your beams of crimson light!

V0006_37_00_00_0.text: The forces of light and darkness intertwine!

V0006_13_00_33_0.text: If you still have any strength left, let's keep fighting!

V0006_13_00_34_0.text: This card fought by Joey's side through thick and thin!

V0006_19_00_09_0.text:
Dark Magician the Knight of Dragon Magic!
Attack!

V0006_19_00_12_0.text: Wield your wand, Silent Magician Zero!

V0006_19_00_00_0.text:
Silent Swordsman LV3!
Are you ready?

V0006_19_00_14_0.text: Unsheathe your blade, Silent Swordsman LV7!

V0006_19_00_18_0.text:
Gandora the Dragon of Destruction!
Blast away!

V0006_19_00_19_0.text:
Gigarays Gandora the Dragon of Destruction!
Attack!

V0006_19_00_20_0.text:
Gandora-G the Dragon of Destruction!
Attack!

V0006_19_00_29_0.text:
Swift Gaia the Fierce Knight!
Attack!

V0006_19_00_32_0.text: Red-Eyes and I are on the same page!

V0006_19_00_32_1.text:
Red-Eyes Soul! Attack!
Inferno Fire Blast!
